descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average grain diameter
descriptors.rationale: single length scale characterizing grain structure

descriptors.name: grain size distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical spread of grain sizes
descriptors.rationale: captures heterogeneity beyond mean grain size

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: grain length to width ratio
descriptors.rationale: quantifies grain elongation and anisotropy

representation.notes: ratio greater than or equal one

descriptors.name: grain boundary area per volume
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: interfacial density affecting kinetics and properties

representation.notes: extensive property inversely scales with grain size

descriptors.name: texture strength
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of crystallographic preferred orientation
descriptors.rationale: measures deviation from random crystallographic orientation

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries that are twins
descriptors.rationale: special boundary type with distinct properties

descriptors.name: high angle boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction boundaries with misorientation above threshold
descriptors.rationale: distinguishes high energy from low energy boundaries

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: average energy per boundary area
descriptors.rationale: thermodynamic driving force for boundary motion

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume
descriptors.rationale: defect density controlling plastic deformation

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: frequency of boundary types by misorientation
descriptors.rationale: complete description of boundary misorientation statistics

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation angle
descriptors.physical_meaning: average crystallographic angle across boundaries
descriptors.rationale: mean misorientation characterizing boundary structure

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.physical_meaning: internal misorientation variation within grains
descriptors.rationale: measures intragranular deformation and dislocation content

descriptors.name: triple junction density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of triple junctions per volume
descriptors.rationale: topological feature density affecting boundary network

representation.notes: scales inversely with grain size squared

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of neighboring grains per grain
descriptors.rationale: connectivity measure of grain network

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average size of dislocation cell structures
descriptors.rationale: sub-grain scale microstructural feature

representation.notes: length scale smaller than grain size

descriptors.name: stored elastic energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: energy stored in defects per volume
descriptors.rationale: thermodynamic driving force for recovery and recrystallization

representation.notes: energy density from dislocations and boundaries

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.physical_meaning: boundary velocity per unit driving force
descriptors.rationale: kinetic coefficient for boundary migration

descriptors.name: grain boundary tortuosity
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of actual to straight boundary length
descriptors.rationale: geometric complexity of boundary paths

representation.notes: ratio greater than or equal one

descriptors.name: grain shape factor
descriptors.physical_meaning: measure of grain circularity or sphericity
descriptors.rationale: quantifies deviation from ideal spherical shape

representation.notes: one for sphere, decreases with irregularity

descriptors.name: recrystallized fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of recrystallized grains
descriptors.rationale: progress variable for recrystallization transformation

descriptors.name: grain boundary segregation
descriptors.physical_meaning: solute concentration enrichment at boundaries
descriptors.rationale: chemical heterogeneity affecting boundary properties

descriptors.name: grain boundary curvature
descriptors.physical_meaning: average radius of boundary curvature
descriptors.rationale: geometric measure driving capillarity-driven boundary motion

representation.notes: mean curvature radius over boundary network

descriptors.name: grain boundary plane distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: frequency of boundary crystallographic planes
descriptors.rationale: distribution of boundary plane orientations

descriptors.name: grain boundary connectivity
descriptors.physical_meaning: percolation of boundary network through microstructure
descriptors.rationale: topological measure of boundary network continuity

descriptors.name: lattice rotation rate
descriptors.physical_meaning: rate of orientation change during deformation
descriptors.rationale: kinetic measure of crystallographic evolution

descriptors.name: grain neighbor misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: average misorientation between adjacent grains
descriptors.rationale: local orientation gradient measure

descriptors.name: grain boundary precipitation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of precipitates per boundary area
descriptors.rationale: second phase distribution on boundaries
